description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the centos:7 Docker image with a before_script that installs make via yum and runs make ci-prepare-env. Cache the .cache/ directory under the key chef-rkt and define variables CHEFDK_FILE, CHEFDK_SHA256, and CHEFDK_URL with the provided values. Define three stages: spec, test, and deploy. In the test stage add four kitchen jobs: "kitchen default" runs make kitchen KITCHEN_INSTANCE='^default-'; "kitchen packages" runs make kitchen KITCHEN_INSTANCE='^packages-'; "kitchen testing packages" runs make kitchen KITCHEN_INSTANCE='^testing-packages-' and is allowed to fail and only runs on the master branch; "kitchen without-sudo" runs make kitchen KITCHEN_INSTANCE='^without-sudo-'. In the spec stage add a lint job that runs make lint and a spec job that runs make spec. In the deploy stage add a release job that runs make deploy and only triggers on tags matching the pattern ^v[[:digit:]]*\.[[:digit:]]*\.[[:digit:]]*$.
